blocks.html_en: For more than two decades, NVIDIA technologies — from GPU-accelerated viewports and CUDA-powered effects to NVIDIA RTX PRO ray tracing, AI denoising, neural rendering and real-time simulation — have helped accelerate the DCC tools that artists, studios and developers use to build the world’s games, films, television shows and advertising content.

sentences.en: For more than two decades, NVIDIA technologies — from GPU-accelerated viewports and CUDA-powered effects to NVIDIA RTX PRO ray tracing, AI denoising, neural rendering and real-time simulation — have helped accelerate the DCC tools that artists, studios and developers use to build the world’s games, films, television shows and advertising content.
sentences.zh: 二十多年来，NVIDIA 技术（从 GPU 加速视口和 CUDA 驱动的效果到 NVIDIA RTX PRO 光线追踪、AI 去噪、神经渲染和实时模拟）帮助加速了艺术家、工作室和开发人员用来构建世界游戏、电影、电视节目和广告内容的 DCC 工具。

blocks.html_en: MCP is opening the next chapter of accelerated creativity: applications aren’t just getting faster. They’re becoming agent-ready.

sentences.en: MCP is opening the next chapter of accelerated creativity: applications aren’t just getting faster.
sentences.zh: MCP 正在开启加速创造力的新篇章：应用程序不仅仅是变得更快。

sentences.en: They’re becoming agent-ready.
sentences.zh: 他们正在为代理做好准备。

blocks.html_en: From Acceleration to Action

sentences.en: From Acceleration to Action
sentences.zh: 从加速到行动

blocks.html_en: With MCP-connected tools, an artist or technical director can ask an agent to inspect a scene for missing textures, flag inconsistent color management, prepare export variants, generate playblasts for dailies or validate a shot against pipeline rules, all while keeping creative decisions in human hands.

sentences.en: With MCP-connected tools, an artist or technical director can ask an agent to inspect a scene for missing textures, flag inconsistent color management, prepare export variants, generate playblasts for dailies or validate a shot against pipeline rules, all while keeping creative decisions in human hands.
sentences.zh: 借助 MCP 连接的工具，艺术家或技术总监可以要求代理检查场景中是否缺少纹理、标记不一致的色彩管理、准备导出变体、为样片生成播放预览或根据流程规则验证镜头，同时将创意决策掌握在人手中。

blocks.html_en: The same NVIDIA platform that accelerated viewports, rendering, simulation and AI effects can now power local agents, model inference and multi-application workflows on systems designed for professional creators.

sentences.en: The same NVIDIA platform that accelerated viewports, rendering, simulation and AI effects can now power local agents, model inference and multi-application workflows on systems designed for professional creators.
sentences.zh: 加速视口、渲染、模拟和 AI 效果的同一 NVIDIA 平台现在可以在专为专业创作者设计的系统上为本地代理、模型推理和多应用程序工作流程提供支持。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA RTX PRO workstations, DGX Spark and DGX Station systems are designed to bring accelerated AI performance closer to artists, developers and studio pipelines. Running models and agents locally can help improve responsiveness, reduce reliance on external services and keep sensitive creative data in controlled environments.

sentences.en: NVIDIA RTX PRO workstations, DGX Spark and DGX Station systems are designed to bring accelerated AI performance closer to artists, developers and studio pipelines.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA RTX PRO 工作站、DGX Spark 和 DGX Station 系统旨在让加速的 AI 性能更接近艺术家、开发人员和工作室流程。

sentences.en: Running models and agents locally can help improve responsiveness, reduce reliance on external services and keep sensitive creative data in controlled environments.
sentences.zh: 在本地运行模型和代理可以帮助提高响应能力，减少对外部服务的依赖，并将敏感的创意数据保留在受控环境中。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit also supports MCP integration, including an MCP client for connecting to remote MCP servers and an MCP server for publishing tools to any MCP client.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit also supports MCP integration, including an MCP client for connecting to remote MCP servers and an MCP server for publishing tools to any MCP client.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 还支持 MCP 集成，包括用于连接到远程 MCP 服务器的 MCP 客户端和用于向任何 MCP 客户端发布工具的 MCP 服务器。

blocks.html_en: The Creative Ecosystem Goes Agent-Ready

sentences.en: The Creative Ecosystem Goes Agent-Ready
sentences.zh: 创意生态系统已为代理做好准备

blocks.html_en: Across the creative ecosystem, creative applications and platforms are exposing MCP connections or MCP-ready workflows, giving AI agents more grounded access to real production context.

sentences.en: Across the creative ecosystem, creative applications and platforms are exposing MCP connections or MCP-ready workflows, giving AI agents more grounded access to real production context.
sentences.zh: 在整个创意生态系统中，创意应用程序和平台正在公开 MCP 连接或 MCP 就绪工作流程，使 AI 代理能够更深入地访问真实的生产环境。

blocks.html_en: Adobe is expanding its creative agent across Firefly, Express and Creative Cloud, powering AI Assistant experiences that enable creators to describe the outcome they want while the assistant orchestrates multistep workflows. Adobe is also bringing its pro-grade creative tools to third-party AI platforms through the Adobe connector, extending its creative capabilities wherever people create and work. For developers, Adobe provides the Adobe Express Developer MCP Server, enabling AI coding assistants to build Adobe Express add-ons using official documentation and application programming interfaces (APIs).

sentences.en: Adobe is expanding its creative agent across Firefly, Express and Creative Cloud, powering AI Assistant experiences that enable creators to describe the outcome they want while the assistant orchestrates multistep workflows.
sentences.zh: Adobe 正在 Firefly、Express 和 Creative Cloud 上扩展其创意代理，为 AI 助理体验提供支持，使创作者能够在助理协调多步骤工作流程的同时描述他们想要的结果。

sentences.en: Adobe is also bringing its pro-grade creative tools to third-party AI platforms through the Adobe connector, extending its creative capabilities wherever people create and work.
sentences.zh: Adobe 还通过 Adob​​e 连接器将其专业级创意工具引入第三方 AI 平台，将其创意能力扩展到人们在任何地方进行创作和工作的地方。

sentences.en: For developers, Adobe provides the Adobe Express Developer MCP Server, enabling AI coding assistants to build Adobe Express add-ons using official documentation and application programming interfaces (APIs).
sentences.zh: 对于开发人员，Adobe 提供了 Adob​​e Express Developer MCP Server，使 AI 编码助手能够使用官方文档和应用程序编程接口 (API) 构建 Adob​​e Express 附加组件。

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Firefly-Creative-Agentic-June-News-2.mp4

blocks.html_en: Affinity by Canva has introduced an AI Connector for Claude that uses MCP to bring natural-language automation directly into Affinity. Designers can ask Claude to handle repetitive production tasks such as renaming layers and artboards, resizing and reformatting assets for multiple channels, applying bulk edits, optimizing vector paths and preparing files for delivery. Beyond individual tasks, Claude can also help users build reusable scripts and custom features tailored to their workflows, reducing production overhead and giving creative professionals more time to focus on design.

sentences.en: Affinity by Canva has introduced an AI Connector for Claude that uses MCP to bring natural-language automation directly into Affinity.
sentences.zh: Affinity by Canva 为 Claude 引入了 AI 连接器，它使用 MCP 将自然语言自动化直接引入 Affinity。

sentences.en: Designers can ask Claude to handle repetitive production tasks such as renaming layers and artboards, resizing and reformatting assets for multiple channels, applying bulk edits, optimizing vector paths and preparing files for delivery.
sentences.zh: 设计师可以要求 Claude 处理重复性的制作任务，例如重命名图层和画板、调整多个渠道的资源大小和重新格式化、应用批量编辑、优化矢量路径以及准备要交付的文件。

sentences.en: Beyond individual tasks, Claude can also help users build reusable scripts and custom features tailored to their workflows, reducing production overhead and giving creative professionals more time to focus on design.
sentences.zh: 除了个人任务之外，Claude 还可以帮助用户构建可重用的脚本和适合其工作流程的自定义功能，从而减少生产开销，并让创意专业人士有更多时间专注于设计。

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Affinity-by-Canva-MCP.mp4

blocks.html_en: Blender offers a lightweight MCP server through Blender Lab, providing a natural-language interface to Blender’s Python API, documentation and complex setups. For independent artists and studios, Blender offers a strong example of how open creative tools can become agent-accessible without changing the creative center of gravity.

sentences.en: Blender offers a lightweight MCP server through Blender Lab, providing a natural-language interface to Blender’s Python API, documentation and complex setups.
sentences.zh: Blender 通过 Blender Lab 提供轻量级 MCP 服务器，为 Blender 的 Python API、文档和复杂设置提供自然语言界面。

sentences.en: For independent artists and studios, Blender offers a strong example of how open creative tools can become agent-accessible without changing the creative center of gravity.
sentences.zh: 对于独立艺术家和工作室来说，Blender 提供了一个强有力的例子，说明开放式创意工具如何在不改变创意重心的情况下变得可供代理访问。

blocks.html_en: Boris FX Silhouette now includes an MCP server that lets AI assistants work directly inside your projects. Using Silhouette’s FX Scripting API as first-class MCP tools, assistants can inspect projects, build node trees, edit shapes and keyframes, and render frames. A new preferences panel simplifies setup by installing the MCP package, generating a ready-to-paste client configuration, and testing the connection. Interactive online mode connects to your active session, while offline mode runs headless instances for automation, batch processing, and large-scale workflows.

sentences.en: Boris FX Silhouette now includes an MCP server that lets AI assistants work directly inside your projects.
sentences.zh: Boris FX Silhouette 现在包含一个 MCP 服务器，可让 AI 助手直接在您的项目中工作。

sentences.en: Using Silhouette’s FX Scripting API as first-class MCP tools, assistants can inspect projects, build node trees, edit shapes and keyframes, and render frames.
sentences.zh: 使用 Silhouette 的 FX 脚本 API 作为一流的 MCP 工具，助手可以检查项目、构建节点树、编辑形状和关键帧以及渲染帧。

sentences.en: A new preferences panel simplifies setup by installing the MCP package, generating a ready-to-paste client configuration, and testing the connection.
sentences.zh: 新的首选项面板通过安装 MCP 包、生成可粘贴的客户端配置以及测试连接来简化设置。

sentences.en: Interactive online mode connects to your active session, while offline mode runs headless instances for automation, batch processing, and large-scale workflows.
sentences.zh: 交互式在线模式连接到您的活动会话，而离线模式则运行无头实例以实现自动化、批处理和大规模工作流程。

blocks.html_en: Foundry Griptape natively supports MCP, providing AI orchestration specifically designed for professional VFX pipelines. This integration enables studios to securely manage multiple AI models and agents while maintaining the necessary traceability and creative control. By integrating with tools like Blender and Foundry Nuke, Griptape automates repetitive production tasks — such as cleanup, matte painting and quality control — all while ensuring artists remain in final command of the creative process.

sentences.en: Foundry Griptape natively supports MCP, providing AI orchestration specifically designed for professional VFX pipelines.
sentences.zh: Foundry Griptape 本身支持 MCP，提供专为专业 VFX 管道设计的 AI 编排。

sentences.en: This integration enables studios to securely manage multiple AI models and agents while maintaining the necessary traceability and creative control.
sentences.zh: 这种集成使工作室能够安全地管理多个人工智能模型和代理，同时保持必要的可追溯性和创意控制。

sentences.en: By integrating with tools like Blender and Foundry Nuke, Griptape automates repetitive production tasks — such as cleanup, matte painting and quality control — all while ensuring artists remain in final command of the creative process.
sentences.zh: 通过与 Blender 和 Foundry Nuke 等工具集成，Griptape 可以自动执行重复性制作任务，例如清理、遮罩绘画和质量控制，同时确保艺术家对创作过程拥有最终控制权。

blocks.html_en: SideFX is bringing MCP support to Houdini 22 through its new APEX Script workflow. AI assistants can access a curated collection of APEX Script syntax, functions, documentation and examples, helping artists generate and refine code for procedural character rigs. SideFX’s initial implementation focuses on APEX Script and character rigging, while community-developed MCP servers offer broader ways for agents to interact with Houdini.

sentences.en: SideFX is bringing MCP support to Houdini 22 through its new APEX Script workflow.
sentences.zh: SideFX 通过其新的 APEX 脚本工作流程为 Houdini 22 提供 MCP 支持。

sentences.en: AI assistants can access a curated collection of APEX Script syntax, functions, documentation and examples, helping artists generate and refine code for procedural character rigs.
sentences.zh: AI 助手可以访问精选的 APEX Script 语法、函数、文档和示例集合，帮助艺术家生成和完善程序角色装备的代码。

sentences.en: SideFX’s initial implementation focuses on APEX Script and character rigging, while community-developed MCP servers offer broader ways for agents to interact with Houdini.
sentences.zh: SideFX 的初始实现侧重于 APEX 脚本和角色绑定，而社区开发的 MCP 服务器为代理与 Houdini 交互提供了更广泛的方式。

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Houdini-22-MCP.mp4

blocks.html_en: Unreal Engine recently announced the ability to connect AI clients to Unreal Editor through MCP, enabling AI workflows that can interact with editor capabilities through a standardized protocol. For game developers, virtual production teams and real-time artists, this opens the door to assistants that can reason over scenes, assets and project state.

sentences.en: Unreal Engine recently announced the ability to connect AI clients to Unreal Editor through MCP, enabling AI workflows that can interact with editor capabilities through a standardized protocol.
sentences.zh: 虚幻引擎最近宣布能够通过 MCP 将 AI 客户端连接到虚幻编辑器，从而使 AI 工作流程能够通过标准化协议与编辑器功能进行交互。

sentences.en: For game developers, virtual production teams and real-time artists, this opens the door to assistants that can reason over scenes, assets and project state.
sentences.zh: 对于游戏开发人员、虚拟制作团队和实时艺术家来说，这为助手打开了大门，可以对场景、资产和项目状态进行推理。

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Unreal-MCP.mp4

blocks.html_en: See how NVIDIA RTX PRO and DGX systems bring local AI agents closer to creative work at SIGGRAPH.

sentences.en: See how NVIDIA RTX PRO and DGX systems bring local AI agents closer to creative work at SIGGRAPH.
sentences.zh: 了解 NVIDIA RTX PRO 和 DGX 系统如何让本地 AI 代理更接近 SIGGRAPH 的创造性工作。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA AI for Media Helps Newsrooms Detect Synthetic Video 🔗

sentences.en: NVIDIA AI for Media Helps Newsrooms Detect Synthetic Video 🔗
sentences.zh: NVIDIA AI 媒体帮助新闻编辑室检测合成视频 🔗

blocks.html_en: Every day, video brings the world’s biggest stories into view — from breaking news across continents, to events reshaping communities, to moments that unite people across the globe. In a news cycle that moves around the clock, trustworthy video is the medium through which people see what’s happening, understand why it matters and stay connected and up to date.

sentences.en: Every day, video brings the world’s biggest stories into view — from breaking news across continents, to events reshaping communities, to moments that unite people across the globe.
sentences.zh: 每天，视频都会呈现世界上最重大的故事——从各大洲的突发新闻，到重塑社区的事件，再到将全球各地的人们团结在一起的时刻。

sentences.en: In a news cycle that moves around the clock, trustworthy video is the medium through which people see what’s happening, understand why it matters and stay connected and up to date.
sentences.zh: 在昼夜不停的新闻周期中，值得信赖的视频是人们了解正在发生的事情、了解其重要性并保持联系和了解最新情况的媒介。

blocks.html_en: For that reason, public trust in video is more essential than ever. At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA announced the Synthetic Video Detector NVIDIA NIM microservice, part of the NVIDIA AI for Media platform, to bring an AI-assisted detection signal into editorial and media workflows.

sentences.en: For that reason, public trust in video is more essential than ever.
sentences.zh: 因此，公众对视频的信任比以往任何时候都更加重要。

sentences.en: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA announced the Synthetic Video Detector NVIDIA NIM microservice, part of the NVIDIA AI for Media platform, to bring an AI-assisted detection signal into editorial and media workflows.
sentences.zh: 在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 宣布推出合成视频检测器 NVIDIA NIM 微服务，它是 NVIDIA AI for Media 平台的一部分，可将 AI 辅助检测信号引入编辑和媒体工作流程。

blocks.html_en: The NIM microservice analyzes video frame by frame to produce a classifier score of whether it contains synthetic content. Editorial teams can use that score to prioritize clips for review, flag or quarantine questionable footage, or escalate it for deeper analysis.

sentences.en: The NIM microservice analyzes video frame by frame to produce a classifier score of whether it contains synthetic content.
sentences.zh: NIM 微服务逐帧分析视频，以生成是否包含合成内容的分类器分数。

sentences.en: Editorial teams can use that score to prioritize clips for review, flag or quarantine questionable footage, or escalate it for deeper analysis.
sentences.zh: 编辑团队可以使用该分数来确定剪辑的优先级以供审查、标记或隔离有问题的镜头，或将其升级以进行更深入的分析。

blocks.html_en: Rather than replacing established verification practices, the microservice provides another signal for time-sensitive decisions — helping teams move quickly while protecting editorial standards and ensuring public trust.

sentences.en: Rather than replacing established verification practices, the microservice provides another signal for time-sensitive decisions — helping teams move quickly while protecting editorial standards and ensuring public trust.
sentences.zh: 微服务并没有取代既定的验证实践，而是为时间敏感的决策提供了另一个信号——帮助团队快速行动，同时保护编辑标准并确保公众信任。

blocks.html_en: Synthetic Video Detector remains effective after the compression, resizing, cropping and re-encoding steps common in newsroom and social-video workflows. In NVIDIA testing, the model’s accuracy reached up to 92% on uncompressed video, 87% at 15% compression and 82% at 50% compression.

sentences.en: Synthetic Video Detector remains effective after the compression, resizing, cropping and re-encoding steps common in newsroom and social-video workflows.
sentences.zh: 在新闻编辑室和社交视频工作流程中常见的压缩、调整大小、裁剪和重新编码步骤之后，合成视频检测器仍然有效。

sentences.en: In NVIDIA testing, the model’s accuracy reached up to 92% on uncompressed video, 87% at 15% compression and 82% at 50% compression.
sentences.zh: 在 NVIDIA 测试中，该模型在未压缩视频上的准确率高达 92%，在 15% 压缩时准确率高达 87%，在 50% 压缩时准确率高达 82%。

blocks.html_en: The NIM microservice can process 1080p video in as little as 22 milliseconds on NVIDIA RTX systems and approximately 30 milliseconds on NVIDIA L40 GPUs.

sentences.en: The NIM microservice can process 1080p video in as little as 22 milliseconds on NVIDIA RTX systems and approximately 30 milliseconds on NVIDIA L40 GPUs.
sentences.zh: NIM 微服务在 NVIDIA RTX 系统上可以在短短 22 毫秒内处理 1080p 视频，在 NVIDIA L40 GPU 上处理大约 30 毫秒。

blocks.html_en: Deploy Detection Where Video Lives

sentences.en: Deploy Detection Where Video Lives
sentences.zh: 在视频所在的地方部署检测

blocks.html_en: Organizations can deploy the NIM microservice closer to where sensitive video is captured, stored or distributed, including in on-premises, edge, hybrid and approved air-gapped environments. This flexibility helps teams maintain control over video data, access and operations.

sentences.en: Organizations can deploy the NIM microservice closer to where sensitive video is captured, stored or distributed, including in on-premises, edge, hybrid and approved air-gapped environments.
sentences.zh: 组织可以将 NIM 微服务部署在更靠近敏感视频捕获、存储或分发的位置，包括在本地、边缘、混合和经批准的气隙环境中。

sentences.en: This flexibility helps teams maintain control over video data, access and operations.
sentences.zh: 这种灵活性有助于团队保持对视频数据、访问和操作的控制。

blocks.html_en: Partner adoption is already helping move Synthetic Video Detector from model capability to deployable media infrastructure. Wowza is embedding the microservice through the Wowza Video Intelligence Framework, bringing real-time synthetic video detection into livestreaming workflows used across more than 35,000 deployments in over 170 countries.

sentences.en: Partner adoption is already helping move Synthetic Video Detector from model capability to deployable media infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 合作伙伴的采用已经帮助将合成视频检测器从模型功能转移到可部署的媒体基础设施。

sentences.en: Wowza is embedding the microservice through the Wowza Video Intelligence Framework, bringing real-time synthetic video detection into livestreaming workflows used across more than 35,000 deployments in over 170 countries.
sentences.zh: Wowza 正在通过 Wowza 视频智能框架嵌入微服务，将实时合成视频检测引入到直播工作流程中，该工作流程在 170 多个国家/地区的 35,000 多个部署中使用。

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/synthetic-video-nim-demo.mp4

blocks.html_en: That scale matters because many of the organizations most exposed to synthetic media risk, including broadcasters, government agencies, financial institutions and critical infrastructure operators, also face strict requirements around data residency, security and operational control.

sentences.en: That scale matters because many of the organizations most exposed to synthetic media risk, including broadcasters, government agencies, financial institutions and critical infrastructure operators, also face strict requirements around data residency, security and operational control.
sentences.zh: 这种规模很重要，因为许多最容易面临合成媒体风险的组织，包括广播公司、政府机构、金融机构和关键基础设施运营商，也面临着数据驻留、安全和运营控制方面的严格要求。

blocks.html_en: By pairing Synthetic Video Detector with a video infrastructure layer customers already use, Wowza can help make AI-assisted verification available closer to ingest and streaming operations, allowing teams to flag questionable video in real time while keeping sensitive footage inside their own environments.

sentences.en: By pairing Synthetic Video Detector with a video infrastructure layer customers already use, Wowza can help make AI-assisted verification available closer to ingest and streaming operations, allowing teams to flag questionable video in real time while keeping sensitive footage inside their own environments.
sentences.zh: 通过将合成视频检测器与客户已经使用的视频基础设施层配对，Wowza 可以帮助使人工智能辅助验证更接近摄取和流媒体操作，从而使团队能够实时标记有问题的视频，同时将敏感镜头保留在自己的环境中。

blocks.html_en: Try the NVIDIA Synthetic Video Detector NIM microservice.

sentences.en: Try the NVIDIA Synthetic Video Detector NIM microservice.
sentences.zh: 尝试 NVIDIA 合成视频检测器 NIM 微服务。

blocks.html_en: See notice regarding software product information.

sentences.en: See notice regarding software product information.
sentences.zh: 请参阅有关软件产品信息的通知。

blocks.html_en: Now Openly Available, NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge Brings Frontier World Models to Edge GPUs for Local Physical AI 🔗

sentences.en: Now Openly Available, NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge Brings Frontier World Models to Edge GPUs for Local Physical AI 🔗
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge 现已公开发售，将前沿世界模型引入边缘 GPU，以实现本地物理 AI 🔗

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/cosmos-3-video.mp4

blocks.html_en: Physical AI systems rely on world models to perceive, reason over and predict the physical environment. But the real world is vast, unpredictable and always changing.

sentences.en: Physical AI systems rely on world models to perceive, reason over and predict the physical environment.
sentences.zh: 物理人工智能系统依靠世界模型来感知、推理和预测物理环境。

sentences.en: But the real world is vast, unpredictable and always changing.
sentences.zh: 但现实世界是广阔的、不可预测的并且总是在变化。

blocks.html_en: Whether a robot navigating a warehouse or a camera network monitoring a factory floor, physical AI systems need to understand what’s happening now, reason about what may happen next and act quickly enough to have an impact. Until now, delivering such frontier AI at the edge has often meant trading model capability for deployment efficiency.

sentences.en: Whether a robot navigating a warehouse or a camera network monitoring a factory floor, physical AI systems need to understand what’s happening now, reason about what may happen next and act quickly enough to have an impact.
sentences.zh: 无论是在仓库中导航的机器人还是监控工厂车间的摄像头网络，物理人工智能系统都需要了解现在正在发生的事情，推理接下来可能发生的事情，并足够快地采取行动以产生影响。

sentences.en: Until now, delivering such frontier AI at the edge has often meant trading model capability for deployment efficiency.
sentences.zh: 到目前为止，在边缘提供此类前沿人工智能通常意味着以模型能力换取部署效率。

blocks.html_en: Now available, NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge helps eliminate that tradeoff. The 4-billion-parameter omnimodel is optimized for memory-efficient deployment and high throughput on NVIDIA Jetson, NVIDIA RTX PRO and NVIDIA DGX systems, as well as GeForce RTX GPUs.

sentences.en: Now available, NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge helps eliminate that tradeoff.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge 现已推出，有助于消除这种权衡。

sentences.en: The 4-billion-parameter omnimodel is optimized for memory-efficient deployment and high throughput on NVIDIA Jetson, NVIDIA RTX PRO and NVIDIA DGX systems, as well as GeForce RTX GPUs.
sentences.zh: 拥有 40 亿参数的全模型针对 NVIDIA Jetson、NVIDIA RTX PRO 和 NVIDIA DGX 系统以及 GeForce RTX GPU 上的内存高效部署和高吞吐量进行了优化。

blocks.html_en: Extending NVIDIA Cosmos 3, the compact world foundation model can understand and generate text, image, video, ambient sound and action. Its mixture-of-transformers architecture enables physically grounded, real-time vision analytics and robot action on device.

sentences.en: Extending NVIDIA Cosmos 3, the compact world foundation model can understand and generate text, image, video, ambient sound and action.
sentences.zh: 紧凑世界基础模型扩展了 NVIDIA Cosmos 3，可以理解并生成文本、图像、视频、环境声音和动作。

sentences.en: Its mixture-of-transformers architecture enables physically grounded, real-time vision analytics and robot action on device.
sentences.zh: 其混合变压器架构可实现物理接地、实时视觉分析和设备上的机器人动作。

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Edge delivers frontier physical AI at the edge — ranking No. 1 on VANTAGE-Bench for vision analytics success in its parameter class and enabling state-of-the-art robot learning through post-training.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 Edge delivers frontier physical AI at the edge — ranking No. 1 on VANTAGE-Bench for vision analytics success in its parameter class and enabling state-of-the-art robot learning through post-training.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 Edge 在边缘提供前沿的物理人工智能 - 在 VANTAGE-Bench 上因其参数类别的视觉分析成功而排名第一，并通过后期培训实现最先进的机器人学习。

blocks.html_en: On-Device Physical AI Across Robotics, Autonomous Vehicles and Smart Infrastructure

sentences.en: On-Device Physical AI Across Robotics, Autonomous Vehicles and Smart Infrastructure
sentences.zh: 跨机器人、自动驾驶汽车和智能基础设施的设备上物理人工智能

blocks.html_en: Developers can post-train Cosmos 3 Edge on proprietary robot and sensor data using the NVIDIA DGX Station deskside AI supercomputer to build specialized world action models, then deploy them on NVIDIA Jetson Thor for real-time robot control policies including for manipulation or locomotion. Agile Robots, Doosan Robotics, Siemens and Skild AI are among the partners that are evaluating Cosmos 3 Edge for robotics workflows.

sentences.en: Developers can post-train Cosmos 3 Edge on proprietary robot and sensor data using the NVIDIA DGX Station deskside AI supercomputer to build specialized world action models, then deploy them on NVIDIA Jetson Thor for real-time robot control policies including for manipulation or locomotion.
sentences.zh: 开发人员可以使用 NVIDIA DGX Station 桌面 AI 超级计算机对专有机器人和传感器数据对 Cosmos 3 Edge 进行后期训练，以构建专门的世界动作模型，然后将其部署在 NVIDIA Jetson Thor 上，以实现实时机器人控制策略，包括操纵或运动。

sentences.en: Agile Robots, Doosan Robotics, Siemens and Skild AI are among the partners that are evaluating Cosmos 3 Edge for robotics workflows.
sentences.zh: Agile Robots、Doosan Robotics、Siemens 和 Skild AI 等合作伙伴正在评估 Cosmos 3 Edge 的机器人工作流程。

blocks.html_en: For autonomous vehicles, Cosmos 3 Edge supports road-scene understanding, traffic reasoning, object-intent prediction and policy-model distillation on resource-constrained hardware. The model could be used as a student backbone for automotive policy model distillation, including with NVIDIA Alpamayo vision language action models.

sentences.en: For autonomous vehicles, Cosmos 3 Edge supports road-scene understanding, traffic reasoning, object-intent prediction and policy-model distillation on resource-constrained hardware.
sentences.zh: 对于自动驾驶汽车，Cosmos 3 Edge 支持资源受限硬件上的道路场景理解、交通推理、对象意图预测和策略模型蒸馏。

sentences.en: The model could be used as a student backbone for automotive policy model distillation, including with NVIDIA Alpamayo vision language action models.
sentences.zh: 该模型可用作汽车政策模型提炼的学生骨干，包括 NVIDIA Alpamayo 视觉语言动作模型。

blocks.html_en: For smart infrastructure, Cosmos 3 Edge enables best-in-class throughput and accuracy with real-time inference on Jetson Thor for vision agents that reason across live video streams for traffic monitoring, public safety, logistics and industrial inspection. Developers can also run the 2-billion-parameter NVIDIA Nemotron-powered reasoning module independently on NVIDIA Jetson Orin 8GB. Centific, Vaidio and YUAN are evaluating Cosmos 3 Edge to accelerate vision agents running at the edge.

sentences.en: For smart infrastructure, Cosmos 3 Edge enables best-in-class throughput and accuracy with real-time inference on Jetson Thor for vision agents that reason across live video streams for traffic monitoring, public safety, logistics and industrial inspection.
sentences.zh: 对于智能基础设施，Cosmos 3 Edge 通过 Jetson Thor 上的实时推理为视觉代理提供一流的吞吐量和准确性，这些视觉代理跨实时视频流进行推理，以进行交通监控、公共安全、物流和工业检查。

sentences.en: Developers can also run the 2-billion-parameter NVIDIA Nemotron-powered reasoning module independently on NVIDIA Jetson Orin 8GB.
sentences.zh: 开发人员还可以在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin 8GB 上独立运行由 NVIDIA Nemotron 驱动的 20 亿参数推理模块。

sentences.en: Centific, Vaidio and YUAN are evaluating Cosmos 3 Edge to accelerate vision agents running at the edge.
sentences.zh: Centific、Vaidio 和 YUAN 正在评估 Cosmos 3 Edge，以加速边缘运行的视觉代理。

blocks.html_en: Cosmos Platform Now Openly Available

sentences.en: Cosmos Platform Now Openly Available
sentences.zh: Cosmos 平台现已开放

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Edge is part of the broader NVIDIA Cosmos platform for developing physical AI world models. With Cosmos 3 available in Edge (4B), Nano (16B) and Super (64B) sizes, developers can choose the right model for each stage of development, from edge deployment to high-fidelity generation.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 Edge is part of the broader NVIDIA Cosmos platform for developing physical AI world models.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 Edge 是更广泛的 NVIDIA Cosmos 平台的一部分，用于开发物理 AI 世界模型。

sentences.en: With Cosmos 3 available in Edge (4B), Nano (16B) and Super (64B) sizes, developers can choose the right model for each stage of development, from edge deployment to high-fidelity generation.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 提供 Edge (4B)、Nano (16B) 和 Super (64B) 尺寸，开发人员可以为从边缘部署到高保真生成的每个开发阶段选择合适的模型。

blocks.html_en: Cosmos 3 Edge, Cosmos 3 Nano and Cosmos 3 Super are available now on Hugging Face, with inference and post-training frameworks and recipes on GitHub.

sentences.en: Cosmos 3 Edge, Cosmos 3 Nano and Cosmos 3 Super are available now on Hugging Face, with inference and post-training frameworks and recipes on GitHub.
sentences.zh: Cosmos 3 Edge、Cosmos 3 Nano 和 Cosmos 3 Super 现已在 Hugging Face 上提供，并在 GitHub 上提供推理和后训练框架和配方。

blocks.html_en: AI Agents Made Easy: Build and Run Personal AI Agents Locally on DGX Station With NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 🔗

sentences.en: AI Agents Made Easy: Build and Run Personal AI Agents Locally on DGX Station With NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 🔗
sentences.zh: AI 代理变得简单：使用 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 在 DGX Station 上本地构建和运行个人 AI 代理 🔗

blocks.html_en: Super agents have arrived on the desktop. NVIDIA DGX Station is the ultimate deskside supercomputer for the AI era, and with NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, setup takes just three steps, and the system can be running in roughly 30 minutes.

sentences.en: Super agents have arrived on the desktop.
sentences.zh: 超级特工已经登陆桌面。

sentences.en: NVIDIA DGX Station is the ultimate deskside supercomputer for the AI era, and with NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, setup takes just three steps, and the system can be running in roughly 30 minutes.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA DGX Station 是 AI 时代的终极桌面超级计算机，使用 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit，只需三个步骤即可完成设置，系统可在大约 30 分钟内运行。

blocks.html_en: On DGX Station, NVIDIA Agent Toolkit brings together NVIDIA NemoClaw, the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra open model, NVIDIA Omniverse libraries as agent-accessible tools and skills, and a secure runtime in a single local system — no internet required. As workloads scale, developers can connect multiple systems together to serve concurrent users, more agents and bigger models.

sentences.en: On DGX Station, NVIDIA Agent Toolkit brings together NVIDIA NemoClaw, the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra open model, NVIDIA Omniverse libraries as agent-accessible tools and skills, and a secure runtime in a single local system — no internet required.
sentences.zh: 在 DGX Station 上，NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 汇集了 NVIDIA NemoClaw、NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 开放模型、NVIDIA Omniverse 库作为代理可访问的工具和技能，以及单个本地系统中的安全运行时 — 无需互联网。

sentences.en: As workloads scale, developers can connect multiple systems together to serve concurrent users, more agents and bigger models.
sentences.zh: 随着工作负载的扩展，开发人员可以将多个系统连接在一起，为并发用户、更多代理和更大的模型提供服务。

blocks.html_en: This gives creatives and engineers the ability to own their own intelligence, with a system that comes ready to run locally. The full stack stack — model, agent, tools — provides a platform for creating and running domain-specific “super agents” that are customized with users’ own data and knowledge.

sentences.en: This gives creatives and engineers the ability to own their own intelligence, with a system that comes ready to run locally.
sentences.zh: 这使得创意人员和工程师能够拥有自己的智慧，并拥有一个可以在本地运行的系统。

sentences.en: The full stack stack — model, agent, tools — provides a platform for creating and running domain-specific “super agents” that are customized with users’ own data and knowledge.
sentences.zh: 完整的堆栈——模型、代理、工具——提供了一个平台，用于创建和运行特定领域的“超级代理”，这些“超级代理”是根据用户自己的数据和知识定制的。

blocks.html_en: The open NVIDIA Agent Toolkit stack on DGX Station includes:

sentences.en: The open NVIDIA Agent Toolkit stack on DGX Station includes:
sentences.zh: DGX Station 上的开放 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 堆栈包括：

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA NemoClaw, open blueprints for building custom autonomous agents, packaging the model, harness and runtime together as a starting point for teams building specialized, domain-specific agents.

sentences.en: NVIDIA NemoClaw, open blueprints for building custom autonomous agents, packaging the model, harness and runtime together as a starting point for teams building specialized, domain-specific agents.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA NemoClaw，用于构建自定义自主代理的开放蓝图，将模型、工具和运行时打包在一起，作为团队构建专业化、特定领域代理的起点。

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, a frontier 550-billion-parameter open model, is optimized to run on DGX Station GB300 systems and serves as the model layer that teams can customize for their own domains.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, a frontier 550-billion-parameter open model, is optimized to run on DGX Station GB300 systems and serves as the model layer that teams can customize for their own domains.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 是一个前沿的 5500 亿参数开放模型，经过优化可在 DGX Station GB300 系统上运行，并作为团队可以针对自己的领域进行定制的模型层。

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA Omniverse libraries extend agent skills into physics simulation and 3D asset workflows, giving creative and engineering professionals tools that go well beyond general-purpose agent capabilities.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Omniverse libraries extend agent skills into physics simulation and 3D asset workflows, giving creative and engineering professionals tools that go well beyond general-purpose agent capabilities.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Omniverse 库将代理技能扩展到物理模拟和 3D 资产工作流程，为创意和工程专业人士提供远远超出通用代理功能的工具。

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA OpenShell, the open source secure runtime, keeps agents sandboxed and governed according to defined policies for how agents interact with tools, systems and data.

sentences.en: NVIDIA OpenShell, the open source secure runtime, keeps agents sandboxed and governed according to defined policies for how agents interact with tools, systems and data.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA OpenShell 是一种开源安全运行时，可根据代理与工具、系统和数据交互方式的定义策略对代理进行沙箱管理和管理。

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip delivers data-center-level performance from the desk on DGX Station, with up to 20 petaflops of FP4 AI compute and 748GB of coherent memory to run large models such as Nemotron Ultra.

sentences.en: NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Desktop Superchip delivers data-center-level performance from the desk on DGX Station, with up to 20 petaflops of FP4 AI compute and 748GB of coherent memory to run large models such as Nemotron Ultra.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra 桌面超级芯片可在 DGX Station 上的桌面上提供数据中心级性能，具有高达 20 petaflops 的 FP4 AI 计算能力和 748GB 相干内存，可运行 Nemotron Ultra 等大型模型。

blocks.html_en: • NVIDIA ConnectX-8 SuperNIC delivers up to 800GB/s of bandwidth in DGX Station, delivering extremely fast, efficient network connectivity, and supports linking up to two DGX Stations to further scale model capacity and performance.

sentences.en: NVIDIA ConnectX-8 SuperNIC delivers up to 800GB/s of bandwidth in DGX Station, delivering extremely fast, efficient network connectivity, and supports linking up to two DGX Stations to further scale model capacity and performance.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA ConnectX-8 SuperNIC 在 DGX Station 中提供高达 800GB/s 的带宽，提供极快、高效的网络连接，并支持链接最多两个 DGX Station，以进一步扩展模型容量和性能。

blocks.html_en: Harness Efficiency at Scale

sentences.en: Harness Efficiency at Scale
sentences.zh: 大规模利用效率

blocks.html_en: For teams running agents at scale the economics shift fundamentally on DGX Station. Nemotron 3 Ultra, tuned for an open harness, delivers leading-edge performance without the per-token cost after the hardware purchase, so users build once and can run as much as they need.

sentences.en: For teams running agents at scale the economics shift fundamentally on DGX Station.
sentences.zh: 对于大规模运行代理的团队来说，DGX Station 上的经济性发生了根本性的转变。

sentences.en: Nemotron 3 Ultra, tuned for an open harness, delivers leading-edge performance without the per-token cost after the hardware purchase, so users build once and can run as much as they need.
sentences.zh: Nemotron 3 Ultra 针对开放式线束进行了调整，可在购买硬件后提供领先的性能，而无需支付每个代币的成本，因此用户只需构建一次即可运行所需的次数。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA has announced a blueprint for integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries in Blender — giving NemoClaw agents callable RTX sensor simulation and physics tools to prepare 3D scenes for physical AI workflows.

sentences.en: NVIDIA has announced a blueprint for integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries in Blender — giving NemoClaw agents callable RTX sensor simulation and physics tools to prepare 3D scenes for physical AI workflows.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA 宣布了将 NVIDIA Omniverse 库集成到 Blender 中的蓝图，为 NemoClaw 代理提供可调用的 RTX 传感器模拟和物理工具，为物理 AI 工作流程准备 3D 场景。

blocks.html_en: On DGX Station, designers and engineers can run the core pieces of that workflow — frontier model, open harness, secure runtime, 3D tools — in one box, all connected and deployable through an open blueprint.

sentences.en: On DGX Station, designers and engineers can run the core pieces of that workflow — frontier model, open harness, secure runtime, 3D tools — in one box, all connected and deployable through an open blueprint.
sentences.zh: 在 DGX Station 上，设计师和工程师可以在一个盒子中运行该工作流程的核心部分——前沿模型、开放式线束、安全运行时、3D 工具，所有这些都通过开放蓝图进行连接和部署。

blocks.html_en: Frontier models can orchestrate NemoClaw as a specialized sub-agent, delegating domain-specific work to an agent running locally on DGX Station, with direct access to Omniverse tools and Blender.

sentences.en: Frontier models can orchestrate NemoClaw as a specialized sub-agent, delegating domain-specific work to an agent running locally on DGX Station, with direct access to Omniverse tools and Blender.
sentences.zh: Frontier 模型可以将 NemoClaw 编排为专门的子代理，将特定于域的工作委托给在 DGX Station 上本地运行的代理，并可直接访问 Omniverse 工具和 Blender。

blocks.html_en: LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for Nemotron 3 Ultra, giving designers and engineers a production-ready path to benchmark-leading agentic performance at a fraction of the cost.

sentences.en: LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for Nemotron 3 Ultra, giving designers and engineers a production-ready path to benchmark-leading agentic performance at a fraction of the cost.
sentences.zh: LangChain 针对 Nemotron 3 Ultra 调整了 Deep Agents 工具，为设计师和工程师提供了一条生产就绪途径，以极低的成本实现基准领先的代理性能。

blocks.html_en: Nous Research fine-tuned Nemotron 3 Ultra for its Hermes Agent harness and adopted it for production workloads — a direct demonstration of the value of owning intelligence. Tuning the model for a developer’s stack enables agents that are both faster and more capable for specific domains. Hermes Agent has also added Blender to its Model Context Protocol catalog, letting teams activate Blender directly from their agent — a live example of a tool-using NemoClaw agent that can run on DGX Station.

sentences.en: Nous Research fine-tuned Nemotron 3 Ultra for its Hermes Agent harness and adopted it for production workloads — a direct demonstration of the value of owning intelligence.
sentences.zh: Nous Research 针对其 Hermes Agent 工具对 Nemotron 3 Ultra 进行了微调，并将其用于生产工作负载——这直接证明了拥有智能的价值。

sentences.en: Tuning the model for a developer’s stack enables agents that are both faster and more capable for specific domains.
sentences.zh: 针对开发人员堆栈调整模型可以使代理在特定领域变得更快、能力更强。

sentences.en: Hermes Agent has also added Blender to its Model Context Protocol catalog, letting teams activate Blender directly from their agent — a live example of a tool-using NemoClaw agent that can run on DGX Station.
sentences.zh: Hermes Agent 还将 Blender 添加到其模型上下文协议目录中，让团队可以直接从其代理激活 Blender——这是一个可以在 DGX Station 上运行的使用工具的 NemoClaw 代理的实例。

blocks.html_en: For teams running OpenClaw, this stack extends what’s possible — bringing Nemotron 3 Ultra, Omniverse tools and local inference on DGX Station into an environment where OpenClaw’s persistent, long-running agents can act on them continuously.

sentences.en: For teams running OpenClaw, this stack extends what’s possible — bringing Nemotron 3 Ultra, Omniverse tools and local inference on DGX Station into an environment where OpenClaw’s persistent, long-running agents can act on them continuously.
sentences.zh: 对于运行 OpenClaw 的团队来说，该堆栈扩展了可能性 - 将 Nemotron 3 Ultra、Omniverse 工具和 DGX Station 上的本地推理引入 OpenClaw 持久、长期运行的代理可以持续对其进行操作的环境中。

blocks.html_en: Develop and Deploy Quickly With New Playbooks

sentences.en: Develop and Deploy Quickly With New Playbooks
sentences.zh: 使用新的 Playbook 快速开发和部署

blocks.html_en: Two new playbooks are available now to help developers build and run agents out of the box with NemoClaw and dual-node deployments.

sentences.en: Two new playbooks are available now to help developers build and run agents out of the box with NemoClaw and dual-node deployments.
sentences.zh: 现已推出两本新的手册，可帮助开发人员通过 NemoClaw 和双节点部署构建和运行开箱即用的代理。

blocks.html_en: • “Connect Two DGX Stations for Distributed Workloads” guides users on how to run powerful models with scalable performance connecting up to two DGX Station systems.

sentences.en: “Connect Two DGX Stations for Distributed Workloads” guides users on how to run powerful models with scalable performance connecting up to two DGX Station systems.
sentences.zh: “连接两个 DGX 站以实现分布式工作负载”指导用户如何运行具有可扩展性能的强大模型，连接最多两个 DGX 站系统。

blocks.html_en: • “Run NemoClaw With a Local LLM / On Dual DGX Station” provides a walkthrough on how to set up NemoClaw on DGX Station, enabling out-of-the-box agents with frontier intelligence with Nemotron Ultra.

sentences.en: “Run NemoClaw With a Local LLM / On Dual DGX Station” provides a walkthrough on how to set up NemoClaw on DGX Station, enabling out-of-the-box agents with frontier intelligence with Nemotron Ultra.
sentences.zh: “使用本地法学硕士/在双 DGX 站上运行 NemoClaw”提供了如何在 DGX 站上设置 NemoClaw 的演练，使开箱即用的代理能够通过 Nemotron Ultra 获得前沿情报。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA DGX Station is built and available to order from ASUS, Dell Technologies, Exxact, GIGABYTE, HP, MSI and Supermicro.

sentences.en: NVIDIA DGX Station is built and available to order from ASUS, Dell Technologies, Exxact, GIGABYTE, HP, MSI and Supermicro.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA DGX Station 已建成并可从 ASUS、Dell Technologies、Exxact、GIGABYTE、HP、MSI 和 Supermicro 订购。

blocks.html_en: Get started with NVIDIA NemoClaw and Nemotron Ultra on DGX Station.

sentences.en: Get started with NVIDIA NemoClaw and Nemotron Ultra on DGX Station.
sentences.zh: 开始在 DGX Station 上使用 NVIDIA NemoClaw 和 Nemotron Ultra。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Brings Graphics Research Breakthroughs to Simulation and Physical AI 🔗

sentences.en: NVIDIA Brings Graphics Research Breakthroughs to Simulation and Physical AI 🔗
sentences.zh: NVIDIA 为模拟和物理 AI 带来图形研究突破🔗

sentences.en: https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/MotionBricks.mp4

blocks.html_en: At SIGGRAPH this year, NVIDIA’s research isn’t just focused on creating worlds that look real — but that behave realistically and respond in real time.

sentences.en: At SIGGRAPH this year, NVIDIA’s research isn’t just focused on creating worlds that look real — but that behave realistically and respond in real time.
sentences.zh: 在今年的 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 的研究不仅专注于创造看起来真实的世界，而且还关注行为真实并实时响应的世界。

blocks.html_en: That shift is the throughline across NVIDIA’s 21 accepted technical papers — becoming the foundation of real-time systems that generate virtual worlds and drive machine training in the real world.

sentences.en: That shift is the throughline across NVIDIA’s 21 accepted technical papers — becoming the foundation of real-time systems that generate virtual worlds and drive machine training in the real world.
sentences.zh: 这一转变是 NVIDIA 接受的 21 篇技术论文的主旨，成为生成虚拟世界并驱动现实世界机器训练的实时系统的基础。

blocks.html_en: Whether the output is a game, film, robot or factory digital twin, the goal is the same: expand the canvas of creativity with AI-generated worlds that are grounded in 3D, governed by physics and directed by creators.

sentences.en: Whether the output is a game, film, robot or factory digital twin, the goal is the same: expand the canvas of creativity with AI-generated worlds that are grounded in 3D, governed by physics and directed by creators.
sentences.zh: 无论输出是游戏、电影、机器人还是工厂数字孪生，目标都是相同的：利用人工智能生成的世界来扩展创造力的画布，这些世界以 3D 为基础、受物理控制并由创作者指导。

blocks.html_en: The clearest proof is in MotionBricks: a real-time motion model — trained on more than 350,000 motion clips, running at game-engine speeds — that lets creators direct and connect character movements. The same model that drives the animated character on screen drives a Unitree G1 humanoid robot in the room, using computer graphics and simulation to accelerate physical AI development.

sentences.en: The clearest proof is in MotionBricks: a real-time motion model — trained on more than 350,000 motion clips, running at game-engine speeds — that lets creators direct and connect character movements.
sentences.zh: 最明显的证据是 MotionBricks：一个实时运动模型——经过超过 350,000 个运动剪辑的训练，以游戏引擎的速度运行——让创作者能够指导和连接角色运动。

sentences.en: The same model that drives the animated character on screen drives a Unitree G1 humanoid robot in the room, using computer graphics and simulation to accelerate physical AI development.

blocks.html_en: GPC, a framework for training generative controllers on large-scale motion datasets, extends that idea. NVIDIA pretrains a single controller on large-scale human motion, giving it transferable motor skills that carry over to new tasks. Think of it as the start of a foundation model for motor control.

sentences.en: GPC, a framework for training generative controllers on large-scale motion datasets, extends that idea.
sentences.zh: GPC 是一个在大规模运动数据集上训练生成控制器的框架，它扩展了这个想法。

sentences.en: NVIDIA pretrains a single controller on large-scale human motion, giving it transferable motor skills that carry over to new tasks.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA 针对大规模人体运动对单个控制器进行了预训练，赋予其可转移的运动技能，以用于执行新任务。

sentences.en: Think of it as the start of a foundation model for motor control.
sentences.zh: 将其视为电机控制基础模型的开始。

blocks.html_en: To build virtual worlds in which to test these movements, ArtiFixer turns messy real-world 3D captures into clean, complete virtual scenes. It also includes a new method for predicting photoreal global illumination straight from a scene’s geometry — without tracing a single ray.

sentences.en: To build virtual worlds in which to test these movements, ArtiFixer turns messy real-world 3D captures into clean, complete virtual scenes.
sentences.zh: 为了构建虚拟世界来测试这些动作，ArtiFixer 将杂乱的现实世界 3D 捕获转变为干净、完整的虚拟场景。

sentences.en: It also includes a new method for predicting photoreal global illumination straight from a scene’s geometry — without tracing a single ray.
sentences.zh: 它还包括一种新方法，可以直接从场景的几何形状预测真实的全局照明，而无需跟踪单个光线。

blocks.html_en: To make those virtual worlds behave as they would in the real one, a new solver brings hard-to-simulate materials — such as snow, sand and elastic solids — to life inside the NVIDIA Newton physics engine.

sentences.en: To make those virtual worlds behave as they would in the real one, a new solver brings hard-to-simulate materials — such as snow, sand and elastic solids — to life inside the NVIDIA Newton physics engine.
sentences.zh: 为了使这些虚拟世界的行为与真实世界中的行为一样，一种新的解算器在 NVIDIA Newton 物理引擎中引入了难以模拟的材料（例如雪、沙子和弹性固体）。

blocks.html_en: And to keep creators in control, the VideoNeuMat pipeline gives them reusable, relightable materials to pull out of generative video models, while the ARDY autoregressive diffusion model lets them steer 3D character motion in real time from a text prompt.

sentences.en: And to keep creators in control, the VideoNeuMat pipeline gives them reusable, relightable materials to pull out of generative video models, while the ARDY autoregressive diffusion model lets them steer 3D character motion in real time from a text prompt.
sentences.zh: 为了让创作者保持控制，VideoNeuMat 管道为他们提供了可重复使用、可重新点亮的材质，以便从生成视频模型中提取出来，而 ARDY 自回归扩散模型则让他们可以根据文本提示实时引导 3D 角色运动。

content_html_zh:
今年的 SIGGRAPH 会议将于 7 月 23 日星期四在洛杉矶举行，与会者可以发现领先的图形研究、神经渲染、模拟和人工智能如何改变人类和机器创建和理解世界的方式。

NVIDIA 主题演讲将于今天（7 月 20 日）下午 3:45 举行。 PT 活动将邀请 NVIDIA AI 研究和工程领导者 Neil Ashton、Edward Liu 和 Ming-Yu Liu 讨论由 AI 构建的 AI 的神经渲染技术、世界模型和模拟方法。

请阅读 SIGGRAPH 会议的最新动态，其中 NVIDIA 和合作伙伴展示了：

  • NVIDIA 主题演讲回顾
  • 模型上下文协议连接将代理 AI 引入内容创建
  • 新的合成视频检测器 NIM 微服务
  • Cosmos 3 Edge 本地物理 AI 开放世界模型
  • 带有 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 的 DGX Station 上的 NVIDIA NemoClaw
  • 虚拟世界和物理人工智能的研究突破

在 SIGGRAPH 主题演讲中，NVIDIA 领导者概述了图形和物理 AI 的下一个时代 🔗

NVIDIA AI 研究和工程领导者今天在 SIGGRAPH 上登台分享神经渲染、世界模型和模拟方面的最新进展。 这些技术正在改变数字世界在各个领域的创建和使用方式，可应用于创意工具、工业设计、机器人和自主系统。

NVIDIA 创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋在介绍性视频中表示：“创作者和设计师需要足够强大的工具来扩展他们的想象力，具有足够的可塑性，让他们能够自由地塑造想法，并且足够精确，以完全按照预期实现他们的愿景。” “无论是游戏、电影、机器人还是工厂数字孪生，目标都是相同的：创建与物理世界一样保真和真实的虚拟世界。”

NVIDIA 应用深度学习研究总监 Edward Liu 通过展示 3D 引导神经渲染拉开了演讲的序幕。

他分享了 NVIDIA 在神经渲染方面的最新进展如何解决三个关键研究挑战：保留艺术意图、确保输出在帧之间保持时间稳定以及实时渲染 4K 内容。

“艺术方向的控制对我们来说是一个非常令人兴奋的研究方向，”爱德华刘说。 “模拟定义了世界，生成丰富了它的外观，艺术家指导了结果……人工智能扩展了图形，就像可编程着色器和光线追踪之前扩展图形一样。”

NVIDIA 杰出工程师 Neil Ashton 介绍了 AI 物理创新及其在天气预报、汽车空气动力学、热设计等领域的应用。

在气候和天气研究中，NVIDIA Earth-2 系列开放模型使科学家能够利用基于模拟数据训练的 AI 模型将模拟分辨率提高到新的水平，同时实现与传统方法相同或更高的精度。

阿什顿说：“我们面临的挑战是将这些人工智能模型在天气和气候方面的成功运用到我们生活的世界，以便能够设计未来的飞机、汽车和数据中心。” “NVIDIA 真正关注的事情之一就是帮助实现这一愿景。”

Ashton 分享了 NVIDIA Research 及其合作伙伴开发的最新模型架构如何将模型检查点压缩至几百兆字节，这是一百万倍的压缩，可在一秒钟内实现物理精确的可视化。

NVIDIA Cosmos 实验室副总裁 Ming-Yu Liu 分享了 NVIDIA Cosmos 世界模型的最新进展，NVIDIA Cosmos 是一个用于加速物理 AI 系统开发的世界基础模型平台。

“基础模型之所以成为基础模型，是因为它能够消耗大量不同的数据，”他说。 “我们使用各种物理任务的数据来训练 Cosmos，包括世界理解、预测、模拟和行动。 我们使用一个主干来解决所有不同的任务。”

Ming-Yu Liu 介绍了用于提供 NVIDIA Cosmos 3 全局理解的混合变形金刚模型架构。 此功能可实现跨不同实施例（人形机器人、夹具或自动驾驶汽车）的物理精确结果。

“每个体现都讲不同的语言，”他说。 “我们的解决方案是建立一个通用词汇表。”

NVIDIA Cosmos 包含一系列不同规模的开放模型，可为开发人员提供各种部署用例的支持。 今天发布的最新成员是 Cosmos 3 Edge，这是一个拥有 40 亿参数的模型，专为在设备上实时运行而设计。

Ming-Yu Liu 还发布了 Cosmos-Dreams，这是一系列闭环模拟器，与同事一起演示了一款专为自动驾驶汽车构建的模拟器，该模拟器可以在单个 NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 GPU 上运行，从单个帧生成整个世界。

开发人员可以使用 Cosmos-Dreams 来验证模型的准确性，然后再将其部署到实际车队中，或者使用它在现实世界中难以创建的人工智能生成场景中训练模型，从而加快开发速度，同时节省运营成本。

观看完整的主题演讲并了解有关 Cosmos 3 Edge 的更多信息。

人工智能代理将创意工具扩展到数百万人🔗

领先的创意应用程序正在开放模型上下文协议 (MCP) 连接，让人工智能代理在场景、镜头、时间线、资产和编辑变得栩栩如生的工具中工作，而创作者则保持控制。

二十多年来，NVIDIA 技术（从 GPU 加速视口和 CUDA 驱动的效果到 NVIDIA RTX PRO 光线追踪、AI 去噪、神经渲染和实时模拟）帮助加速了艺术家、工作室和开发人员用来构建世界游戏、电影、电视节目和广告内容的 DCC 工具。

MCP 正在开启加速创造力的新篇章：应用程序不仅仅是变得更快。 他们正在为代理做好准备。

从加速到行动

借助 MCP 连接的工具，艺术家或技术总监可以要求代理检查场景中是否缺少纹理、标记不一致的色彩管理、准备导出变体、为样片生成播放预览或根据流程规则验证镜头，同时将创意决策掌握在人手中。

加速视口、渲染、模拟和 AI 效果的同一 NVIDIA 平台现在可以在专为专业创作者设计的系统上为本地代理、模型推理和多应用程序工作流程提供支持。

NVIDIA RTX PRO 工作站、DGX Spark 和 DGX Station 系统旨在让加速的 AI 性能更接近艺术家、开发人员和工作室流程。 在本地运行模型和代理可以帮助提高响应能力，减少对外部服务的依赖，并将敏感的创意数据保留在受控环境中。

NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 还支持 MCP 集成，包括用于连接到远程 MCP 服务器的 MCP 客户端和用于向任何 MCP 客户端发布工具的 MCP 服务器。

创意生态系统已为代理做好准备

在整个创意生态系统中，创意应用程序和平台正在公开 MCP 连接或 MCP 就绪工作流程，使 AI 代理能够更深入地访问真实的生产环境。

Adobe 正在 Firefly、Express 和 Creative Cloud 上扩展其创意代理，为 AI 助理体验提供支持，使创作者能够在助理协调多步骤工作流程的同时描述他们想要的结果。 Adobe 还通过 Adob​​e 连接器将其专业级创意工具引入第三方 AI 平台，将其创意能力扩展到人们在任何地方进行创作和工作的地方。 对于开发人员，Adobe 提供了 Adob​​e Express Developer MCP Server，使 AI 编码助手能够使用官方文档和应用程序编程接口 (API) 构建 Adob​​e Express 附加组件。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Firefly-Creative-Agentic-June-News-2.mp4

Affinity by Canva 为 Claude 引入了 AI 连接器，它使用 MCP 将自然语言自动化直接引入 Affinity。 设计师可以要求 Claude 处理重复性的制作任务，例如重命名图层和画板、调整多个渠道的资源大小和重新格式化、应用批量编辑、优化矢量路径以及准备要交付的文件。 除了个人任务之外，Claude 还可以帮助用户构建可重用的脚本和适合其工作流程的自定义功能，从而减少生产开销，并让创意专业人士有更多时间专注于设计。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Affinity-by-Canva-MCP.mp4

Blender 通过 Blender Lab 提供轻量级 MCP 服务器，为 Blender 的 Python API、文档和复杂设置提供自然语言界面。 对于独立艺术家和工作室来说，Blender 提供了一个强有力的例子，说明开放式创意工具如何在不改变创意重心的情况下变得可供代理访问。

Boris FX Silhouette 现在包含一个 MCP 服务器，可让 AI 助手直接在您的项目中工作。 使用 Silhouette 的 FX 脚本 API 作为一流的 MCP 工具，助手可以检查项目、构建节点树、编辑形状和关键帧以及渲染帧。 新的首选项面板通过安装 MCP 包、生成可粘贴的客户端配置以及测试连接来简化设置。 交互式在线模式连接到您的活动会话，而离线模式则运行无头实例以实现自动化、批处理和大规模工作流程。

Foundry Griptape 本身支持 MCP，提供专为专业 VFX 管道设计的 AI 编排。 这种集成使工作室能够安全地管理多个人工智能模型和代理，同时保持必要的可追溯性和创意控制。 通过与 Blender 和 Foundry Nuke 等工具集成，Griptape 可以自动执行重复性制作任务，例如清理、遮罩绘画和质量控制，同时确保艺术家对创作过程拥有最终控制权。

SideFX 通过其新的 APEX 脚本工作流程为 Houdini 22 提供 MCP 支持。 AI 助手可以访问精选的 APEX Script 语法、函数、文档和示例集合，帮助艺术家生成和完善程序角色装备的代码。 SideFX 的初始实现侧重于 APEX 脚本和角色绑定，而社区开发的 MCP 服务器为代理与 Houdini 交互提供了更广泛的方式。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Houdini-22-MCP.mp4

虚幻引擎最近宣布能够通过 MCP 将 AI 客户端连接到虚幻编辑器，从而使 AI 工作流程能够通过标准化协议与编辑器功能进行交互。 对于游戏开发人员、虚拟制作团队和实时艺术家来说，这为助手打开了大门，可以对场景、资产和项目状态进行推理。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/Unreal-MCP.mp4

了解 NVIDIA RTX PRO 和 DGX 系统如何让本地 AI 代理更接近 SIGGRAPH 的创造性工作。

NVIDIA AI 媒体帮助新闻编辑室检测合成视频 🔗

每天，视频都会呈现世界上最重大的故事——从各大洲的突发新闻，到重塑社区的事件，再到将全球各地的人们团结在一起的时刻。 在昼夜不停的新闻周期中，值得信赖的视频是人们了解正在发生的事情、了解其重要性并保持联系和了解最新情况的媒介。

因此，公众对视频的信任比以往任何时候都更加重要。 在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 宣布推出合成视频检测器 NVIDIA NIM 微服务，它是 NVIDIA AI for Media 平台的一部分，可将 AI 辅助检测信号引入编辑和媒体工作流程。

NIM 微服务逐帧分析视频，以生成是否包含合成内容的分类器分数。 编辑团队可以使用该分数来确定剪辑的优先级以供审查、标记或隔离有问题的镜头，或将其升级以进行更深入的分析。

微服务并没有取代既定的验证实践，而是为时间敏感的决策提供了另一个信号——帮助团队快速行动，同时保护编辑标准并确保公众信任。

在新闻编辑室和社交视频工作流程中常见的压缩、调整大小、裁剪和重新编码步骤之后，合成视频检测器仍然有效。 在 NVIDIA 测试中，该模型在未压缩视频上的准确率高达 92%，在 15% 压缩时准确率高达 87%，在 50% 压缩时准确率高达 82%。

NIM 微服务在 NVIDIA RTX 系统上可以在短短 22 毫秒内处理 1080p 视频，在 NVIDIA L40 GPU 上处理大约 30 毫秒。

在视频所在的地方部署检测

组织可以将 NIM 微服务部署在更靠近敏感视频捕获、存储或分发的位置，包括在本地、边缘、混合和经批准的气隙环境中。 这种灵活性有助于团队保持对视频数据、访问和操作的控制。

合作伙伴的采用已经帮助将合成视频检测器从模型功能转移到可部署的媒体基础设施。 Wowza 正在通过 Wowza 视频智能框架嵌入微服务，将实时合成视频检测引入到直播工作流程中，该工作流程在 170 多个国家/地区的 35,000 多个部署中使用。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/synthetic-video-nim-demo.mp4

这种规模很重要，因为许多最容易面临合成媒体风险的组织，包括广播公司、政府机构、金融机构和关键基础设施运营商，也面临着数据驻留、安全和运营控制方面的严格要求。

通过将合成视频检测器与客户已经使用的视频基础设施层配对，Wowza 可以帮助使人工智能辅助验证更接近摄取和流媒体操作，从而使团队能够实时标记有问题的视频，同时将敏感镜头保留在自己的环境中。

NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge 现已公开发售，将前沿世界模型引入边缘 GPU，以实现本地物理 AI 🔗

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/cosmos-3-video.mp4

物理人工智能系统依靠世界模型来感知、推理和预测物理环境。 但现实世界是广阔的、不可预测的并且总是在变化。

无论是在仓库中导航的机器人还是监控工厂车间的摄像头网络，物理人工智能系统都需要了解现在正在发生的事情，推理接下来可能发生的事情，并足够快地采取行动以产生影响。 到目前为止，在边缘提供此类前沿人工智能通常意味着以模型能力换取部署效率。

NVIDIA Cosmos 3 Edge 现已推出，有助于消除这种权衡。 拥有 40 亿参数的全模型针对 NVIDIA Jetson、NVIDIA RTX PRO 和 NVIDIA DGX 系统以及 GeForce RTX GPU 上的内存高效部署和高吞吐量进行了优化。

紧凑世界基础模型扩展了 NVIDIA Cosmos 3，可以理解并生成文本、图像、视频、环境声音和动作。 其混合变压器架构可实现物理接地、实时视觉分析和设备上的机器人动作。

Cosmos 3 Edge 在边缘提供前沿的物理人工智能 - 在 VANTAGE-Bench 上因其参数类别的视觉分析成功而排名第一，并通过后期培训实现最先进的机器人学习。

跨机器人、自动驾驶汽车和智能基础设施的设备上物理人工智能

开发人员可以使用 NVIDIA DGX Station 桌面 AI 超级计算机对专有机器人和传感器数据对 Cosmos 3 Edge 进行后期训练，以构建专门的世界动作模型，然后将其部署在 NVIDIA Jetson Thor 上，以实现实时机器人控制策略，包括操纵或运动。 Agile Robots、Doosan Robotics、Siemens 和 Skild AI 等合作伙伴正在评估 Cosmos 3 Edge 的机器人工作流程。

对于自动驾驶汽车，Cosmos 3 Edge 支持资源受限硬件上的道路场景理解、交通推理、对象意图预测和策略模型蒸馏。 该模型可用作汽车政策模型提炼的学生骨干，包括 NVIDIA Alpamayo 视觉语言动作模型。

对于智能基础设施，Cosmos 3 Edge 通过 Jetson Thor 上的实时推理为视觉代理提供一流的吞吐量和准确性，这些视觉代理跨实时视频流进行推理，以进行交通监控、公共安全、物流和工业检查。 开发人员还可以在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin 8GB 上独立运行由 NVIDIA Nemotron 驱动的 20 亿参数推理模块。 Centific、Vaidio 和 YUAN 正在评估 Cosmos 3 Edge，以加速边缘运行的视觉代理。

Cosmos 平台现已开放

Cosmos 3 Edge 是更广泛的 NVIDIA Cosmos 平台的一部分，用于开发物理 AI 世界模型。 Cosmos 3 提供 Edge (4B)、Nano (16B) 和 Super (64B) 尺寸，开发人员可以为从边缘部署到高保真生成的每个开发阶段选择合适的模型。

Cosmos 3 Edge、Cosmos 3 Nano 和 Cosmos 3 Super 现已在 Hugging Face 上提供，并在 GitHub 上提供推理和后训练框架和配方。

AI 代理变得简单：使用 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 在 DGX Station 上本地构建和运行个人 AI 代理 🔗

超级特工已经登陆桌面。 NVIDIA DGX Station 是 AI 时代的终极桌面超级计算机，使用 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit，只需三个步骤即可完成设置，系统可在大约 30 分钟内运行。

在 DGX Station 上，NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 汇集了 NVIDIA NemoClaw、NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 开放模型、NVIDIA Omniverse 库作为代理可访问的工具和技能，以及单个本地系统中的安全运行时 — 无需互联网。 随着工作负载的扩展，开发人员可以将多个系统连接在一起，为并发用户、更多代理和更大的模型提供服务。

这使得创意人员和工程师能够拥有自己的智慧，并拥有一个可以在本地运行的系统。 完整的堆栈——模型、代理、工具——提供了一个平台，用于创建和运行特定领域的“超级代理”，这些“超级代理”是根据用户自己的数据和知识定制的。

DGX Station 上的开放 NVIDIA Agent Toolkit 堆栈包括：

  • NVIDIA NemoClaw，用于构建自定义自主代理的开放蓝图，将模型、工具和运行时打包在一起，作为团队构建专业化、特定领域代理的起点。
  • NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 是一个前沿的 5500 亿参数开放模型，经过优化可在 DGX Station GB300 系统上运行，并作为团队可以针对自己的领域进行定制的模型层。
  • NVIDIA Omniverse 库将代理技能扩展到物理模拟和 3D 资产工作流程，为创意和工程专业人士提供远远超出通用代理功能的工具。
  • NVIDIA OpenShell 是一种开源安全运行时，可根据代理与工具、系统和数据交互方式的定义策略对代理进行沙箱管理和管理。
  • NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra 桌面超级芯片可在 DGX Station 上的桌面上提供数据中心级性能，具有高达 20 petaflops 的 FP4 AI 计算能力和 748GB 相干内存，可运行 Nemotron Ultra 等大型模型。
  • NVIDIA ConnectX-8 SuperNIC 在 DGX Station 中提供高达 800GB/s 的带宽，提供极快、高效的网络连接，并支持链接最多两个 DGX Station，以进一步扩展模型容量和性能。

大规模利用效率

对于大规模运行代理的团队来说，DGX Station 上的经济性发生了根本性的转变。 Nemotron 3 Ultra 针对开放式线束进行了调整，可在购买硬件后提供领先的性能，而无需支付每个代币的成本，因此用户只需构建一次即可运行所需的次数。

NVIDIA 宣布了将 NVIDIA Omniverse 库集成到 Blender 中的蓝图，为 NemoClaw 代理提供可调用的 RTX 传感器模拟和物理工具，为物理 AI 工作流程准备 3D 场景。

在 DGX Station 上，设计师和工程师可以在一个盒子中运行该工作流程的核心部分——前沿模型、开放式线束、安全运行时、3D 工具，所有这些都通过开放蓝图进行连接和部署。

Frontier 模型可以将 NemoClaw 编排为专门的子代理，将特定于域的工作委托给在 DGX Station 上本地运行的代理，并可直接访问 Omniverse 工具和 Blender。

LangChain 针对 Nemotron 3 Ultra 调整了 Deep Agents 工具，为设计师和工程师提供了一条生产就绪途径，以极低的成本实现基准领先的代理性能。

Nous Research 针对其 Hermes Agent 工具对 Nemotron 3 Ultra 进行了微调，并将其用于生产工作负载——这直接证明了拥有智能的价值。 针对开发人员堆栈调整模型可以使代理在特定领域变得更快、能力更强。 Hermes Agent 还将 Blender 添加到其模型上下文协议目录中，让团队可以直接从其代理激活 Blender——这是一个可以在 DGX Station 上运行的使用工具的 NemoClaw 代理的实例。

对于运行 OpenClaw 的团队来说，该堆栈扩展了可能性 - 将 Nemotron 3 Ultra、Omniverse 工具和 DGX Station 上的本地推理引入 OpenClaw 持久、长期运行的代理可以持续对其进行操作的环境中。

使用新的 Playbook 快速开发和部署

现已推出两本新的手册，可帮助开发人员通过 NemoClaw 和双节点部署构建和运行开箱即用的代理。

  • “连接两个 DGX 站以实现分布式工作负载”指导用户如何运行具有可扩展性能的强大模型，连接最多两个 DGX 站系统。
  • “使用本地法学硕士/在双 DGX 站上运行 NemoClaw”提供了如何在 DGX 站上设置 NemoClaw 的演练，使开箱即用的代理能够通过 Nemotron Ultra 获得前沿情报。

NVIDIA 为模拟和物理 AI 带来图形研究突破🔗

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/MotionBricks.mp4

在今年的 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 的研究不仅专注于创造看起来真实的世界，而且还关注行为真实并实时响应的世界。

这一转变是 NVIDIA 接受的 21 篇技术论文的主旨，成为生成虚拟世界并驱动现实世界机器训练的实时系统的基础。

无论输出是游戏、电影、机器人还是工厂数字孪生，目标都是相同的：利用人工智能生成的世界来扩展创造力的画布，这些世界以 3D 为基础、受物理控制并由创作者指导。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/MotionBricks-Robot.mp4

最明显的证据是 MotionBricks：一个实时运动模型——经过超过 350,000 个运动剪辑的训练，以游戏引擎的速度运行——让创作者能够指导和连接角色运动。 驱动屏幕上动画角色的同一模型驱动房间内的 Unitree G1 人形机器人，利用计算机图形和模拟来加速物理人工智能的开发。

GPC 是一个在大规模运动数据集上训练生成控制器的框架，它扩展了这个想法。 NVIDIA 针对大规模人体运动对单个控制器进行了预训练，赋予其可转移的运动技能，以用于执行新任务。 将其视为电机控制基础模型的开始。

https://blogs.nvidia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/07/GPC-Demo.mp4

为了构建虚拟世界来测试这些动作，ArtiFixer 将杂乱的现实世界 3D 捕获转变为干净、完整的虚拟场景。 它还包括一种新方法，可以直接从场景的几何形状预测真实的全局照明，而无需跟踪单个光线。

为了使这些虚拟世界的行为与真实世界中的行为一样，一种新的解算器在 NVIDIA Newton 物理引擎中引入了难以模拟的材料（例如雪、沙子和弹性固体）。

为了让创作者保持控制，VideoNeuMat 管道为他们提供了可重复使用、可重新点亮的材质，以便从生成视频模型中提取出来，而 ARDY 自回归扩散模型则让他们可以根据文本提示实时引导 3D 角色运动。
